news.title: Tesla Has Only 69 Robotaxis In Texas — But They Are Cheap
news.summary: Tesla Inc. is getting lapped in the Texas robotaxi race. The question is whether it matters. Texas Department of Motor Vehicles data as of June 16 puts Tesla’s statewide fleet at just 69 vehicles, according to research from Bank of America. Waymo leads with 620, AVRide has 317, Nuro and Zoox round out the field at 47 and 35. Tesla is also trails its competitors in markets.
